title: matricaria inodora var. salina
intro: Matricaria inodora var. salina, also known as saltwort chamomile or sea chamomile, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to coastal areas. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe and calm irritated skin. The health benefits of Matricaria inodora var. salina include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide relief from skin conditions such as eczema and acne. It can be prepared as a tea, salve, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote skin health and well-being.
